3255640.name: ONIGIRI RUN
3255640.description:
🍙 The Onigiri is on the Run!
An onigiri has escaped from a convenience store shelf, heading for the land of freedom!
Become the “running rice ball” and dash full speed through the city!
It’s a simple-to-play running game—see how far you can make it!

🚗 Watch Out for Obstacles!
Cars, guardrails, street trees...
Everything is a deadly trap for a tiny onigiri!
Dodge with perfect timing and keep on rolling!

❤️ Umeboshi = Lifeline
The longer you run, the more your stamina drains…
Grab umeboshi (pickled plums) along the way to stay energized and keep going!

🌆 The Route Changes Every Run!
Stages are procedurally generated, so every playthrough feels fresh.
Stay alert and race through ever-changing cityscapes!
